problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrocoagulation. Electrocoagulation for suspended particle removal directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
